name: Kui

skills.name: Ethereal Outburst
skills.description: Deals area damage upon taking heavy damage in a single hit or after dying.

skills.name: Mortals!
skills.description: Damages and slows nearby enemies. Marks enemies in the inner circle while dealing extra damage and slowing enemies.

skills.name: Join Me
skills.description:
Throws a chain hook in the target direction that pulls the target back, dealing damage and marking them.
Passive: Defeats and assists permanently boost Health.

skills.name: Into the Void
skills.description: Deals damage multiple times and slows enemies within range. Against marked heroes, the slow effect is upgraded to a stun.

skillsZh.name: 制裁儀式
skillsZh.description: 單次承受巨大傷害或死亡時，對周圍造成範圍傷害。

skillsZh.name: 虛空清道者
skillsZh.description: 鍾馗對周圍造成傷害與減速。對內圈敵人造成更高傷害與減速，並標記目標。

skillsZh.name: 湮滅之鎖
skillsZh.description:
鍾馗朝指定方向發射鉤鎖，鉤回目標造成傷害並標記目標。
被動：擊敗和助攻永久增加生命值。

skillsZh.name: 輪迴吞噬
skillsZh.description: 對範圍內敵人造成多段傷害和減速。對遭到標記的英雄，減速效果升級為暈眩。

tips: Build: Boots of Tranquility, Blazing Cape, Longnight Guardian.
tipsZh: 鍾馗（遊走）：梯度 A，勝率 49.99%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：冷靜之靴、紅蓮斗篷、永夜守護.

faqs.question: Is Kui good in current season?
faqs.answer: Kui is Tier A Support with 49.99% win rate, 0.85% pick rate, and 0.35% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Kui build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Boots of Tranquility, Blazing Cape, Longnight Guardian, Ominous Premonition, Sage's Sanctuary, Golden Blade.

faqs.question: How to counter Kui?
faqs.answer: Pick Wukong, Musashi, Ying. Strong into Cao Cao, Kaizer, Xiang Yu.

faqsZh.question: 鍾馗 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 鍾馗 為 A 梯度，勝率 49.99%、選取 0.85%、禁用 0.35%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 鍾馗 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：冷靜之靴、紅蓮斗篷、永夜守護、不祥徵兆、賢者的庇護、金色聖劍.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 鍾馗？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Wukong、Musashi、Ying。鍾馗 克制 Cao Cao、Kaizer、Xiang Yu。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Cao Cao, Kaizer, Xiang Yu. Weak into: Wukong, Musashi, Ying.

guide.overview: Kui is a Easy Support (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 49.8% win rate and 1.0% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Kui: Deals area damage upon taking heavy damage in a single hit or after dying.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Tranquility, Glacial Buckler, Frigid Charge, then complete Succubus Cloak, Longnight Guardian. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Kui's Support kit. Take Smite & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Mortals! → Join Me → Into the Void → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Into the Void (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Mortals!, and Into the Void on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Mortals! → Join Me → Into the Void → weave basic attacks

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
guide.teamfight: Peel carry first, then look for pick on out-of-position enemies. Ward Tyrant 30s before spawn.
guide.highRank: Kui is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 49.8% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 1.0% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Kui.
comparisons: Kui vs Dolia (Support, Tier S): Dolia is 1.8% pick / 46.1% WR. Kui has +3.7% WR vs Dolia in Camp data. Choose Kui when you need Roaming identity; choose Dolia for Roaming comfort.
Kui vs Cai Yan (Support, Tier S): Cai Yan is 1.3% pick / 50.3% WR. Cai Yan wins 0.6% more often globally. Choose Kui when you need Roaming identity; choose Cai Yan for Roaming comfort.

matchups.summary: Kui excels into Cao Cao, Kaizer, Xiang Yu. Avoid blind picking into Wukong, Musashi, Ying without team peel.
